actorTitle: Vietnam Restaurant Lead Scraper with Emails
shortDescription: Scrape restaurant and cafe leads from Google Maps in Vietnam and extract emails when available.
longDescription: This Actor searches Google Maps for restaurants, cafes, and food businesses in Vietnam, extracts business details, and attempts to find email addresses from available websites. It is useful for food suppliers, delivery platforms, POS vendors, B2B sales teams, and marketing agencies.
targetUser: Food suppliers, delivery platforms, POS vendors, B2B sales teams, and marketing agencies.
buyerPainPoint: Reaching a broad set of local food businesses is difficult when contact research depends on manual map and website visits.
differentiation: Restaurant and cafe-focused Google Maps discovery with optional public website email extraction and lead-quality scoring.
